title: The Fintech Playbook for Latin America
summary: Angela Strange and Gabriel Vásquez speak with Addi founder and CEO Santiago Suárez about building one of Latin America's largest financial platforms. What began as a buy now, pay later product has evolved into a broader ecosystem spanning payments, commerce, logistics, and now banking. Serving millions of consumers and tens of thousands of merchants, Addi sits at the intersection of financial services and commerce in Colombia. The conversation covers building in Latin America, lessons from scaling through multiple market cycles, the importance of technology infrastructure, and why Suárez be...
score_reason: A fintech playbook for Latin America with a founder interview offers strategic insights and trend reads valuable for fintech professionals and business leaders.
partner_takeaway: Latin America’s fintech evolution shows how buy now, pay later products can expand into broader financial ecosystems serving millions.
